description_long: This object is a desktop computer setup featuring a widescreen flat-panel monitor, a full-sized keyboard with RGB backlighting, a mouse on a mousepad, and a large black computer tower. The monitor has a slim, matte black bezel and is supported by a circular pedestal stand. The display shows a colorful abstract image, and the keyboard is illuminated with a spectrum of colors. Cables are visible connecting the monitor, keyboard, and mouse to the computer tower, which has a minimalist front panel and visible rear ports. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for office or home use.
description: A modern desktop computer setup with a widescreen monitor, RGB keyboard, mouse, and a large black tower. The monitor features a slim bezel and a circular pedestal stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor's display, slim bezel, RGB keyboard, mouse, and the front of the computer tower.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the computer tower and the thin profile of the monitor and stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, stand, keyboard, and the computer tower's ports and ventilation.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the arrangement of the monitor, keyboard, mouse, and the computer tower's top surface.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with straight edges and no visible decorative elements or color contrast. It appears uniform in thickness and has a modern, minimalist look.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand made of matte black plastic or metal, with a single vertical support connecting to the back of the screen. No visible adjustability features are present.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or base of the monitor in the provided views.
